data.title: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with per-stack defaults table
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md to add a per-stack reference table showing pre-filled values for commands.test_runner, commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check across Python, Node/JS, Ruby, and Rust stacks.

TDD exemption: Criterion 3 — static documentation asset.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Per-stack table exists with entries for Python, Node/JS, Ruby, Rust
  Verify: grep -q 'Node.*npm\|Ruby.*rspec\|Python.*pytest' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
